MTHFR Gene Test

MTHFR Gene Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an MTHFR gene test? 
An MTHFR gene test checks a sample of your blood for two very common changes in a gene Â called MTHFR . Changes in your genes are also called gene variants or mutations.
Genes are parts of DNA in your cells that you inherit from your parents. You inherit two copies of each gene, one coming from each parent. Genes carry information that controls what you look li
